messages.content:
You are an expert image analyst and caption writer specializing in Singapore context.
Your role is to:
- Remove all personally identifiable information (PII) from the original data, including: comments, title and user_caption.
- Names of people, Phone numbers, email addresses, or websites, Usernames, handles, or tags
- Retain information on public locations, objects and roles of the people in the image.
  - eg. "Head Investigation of Traffic Police John Doe" should be changed to "Head Investigation of Traffic Police"
  - eg. "Red Rhino", referring to the Singapore Civil Defence Force's fire engine, should be retained.
- If there is no PII in the caption, return the caption as it is.
- Retain information of key personnel, such as ministers, senior officials, or public figures. 
- If there is no caption, return an empty string.

Remove all personally identifiable information (PII) from the caption: names, contact information
Keep details about the location, objects and roles of the people in the image.
  - eg. "Head Investigation of Traffic Police John Doe" should be changed to "Head Investigation of Traffic Police"

Here is the caption to process:
BehindTheScenes with our dedicated Citizen on Patrol (COP) volunteers who play a vital role in keeping our neighbourhoods safe. From patrolling their estates to sharing crime prevention tips and alerting the Police to suspicious activities, COP volunteers are the extra eyes and ears that help build a safer living environment for everyone. Watch the Home Teams Honour and Unity micro-drama series on Mediacorps TikTok and YouTube Shorts.OneHomeTeam HonourAndUnity PartnerwithHT HTVolunteers OrdinaryPeopleExtraordinaryMission

If there is no PII in the caption, return the caption as it is.
If there is no caption, return an empty string.

Here is the caption to process:
On set, the professionalism and empathy of our Officers shone through, adding depth and authenticity to every scene they were part of. As Captains of Lives, the officers role goes far beyond secure custody. They are also mentors and changemakers who support the inmates rehabilitation and reintegration, helping them rebuild their lives and return to society with confidence. Watch the Home Teams Honour and Unity micro-drama series on Mediacorps TikTok and YouTube Shorts.OneHomeTeam HonourAndUnity BehindTheScenes CaptainsOfLives

Here is the caption to process:
Get ready for an adrenaline-pumping operation with CNBs Special Task Force (STF) officers to take down syndicates and keep Singapore drug-free. Trained for the toughest missions, STF officers combine their peak physical fitness, sharp tactical instincts, and specialised skills with teamwork, strategy and discipline to execute their operations successfully. Watch the Home Teams Honour and Unity micro-drama series on Mediacorps TikTok and YouTube Shorts.OneHomeTeam HonourAndUnity BehindTheScenes
